name: Fig or Strawberry Newtons
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until well combined.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
3. Stir in the milk, vanilla extract, nutmeg, baking powder, and salt until blended.
4. Gradually mix in flour until the dough reaches a consistency suitable for rolling out on a floured surface.
5. To assemble fig newtons:
- Divide the dough into two portions.
- Roll each piece between two sheets of waxed paper into a rectangle about 8 inches square.
- Lift one layer of waxed paper, create an indentation in the center with the back of a knife.
- Spread jam on half of the dough.
- Fold the dough over at the center line and cut into squares.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
7. Allow to cool on a wire rack before storing in sealed containers.
FIG JAM
Combine 1 cup mashed figs, 3/4 cup sugar, and 2 tablespoons water. Cook over medium heat until thickened. Let it cool completely before using as filling.
Note: For strawberry newtons, substitute the fig jam with an equal amount of mashed strawberries.
